title: There's An Institutional Bottom In Autodesk
text: The price action in Autodesk (NASDAQ: ADSK) has put in a bottom but we don't think investors should rusk into the stock. While the Q1 results were better than expected and the guidance favorable the margin of outperformance was tepid and the guidance in line with consensus estimates.

title: Why Autodesk Shares Are Gaining Today
text: Analysts appreciated Autodesk, Inc (NASDAQ: ADSK) for growing amid macro headwinds. Autodesk reported Q1 FY23 results that were ~3% above Rosenblatt analyst Blair Abernethy's revenue expectations, with higher than anticipated margins, as demand remained strong.

title: Autodesk, Zscaler Send the Nasdaq Soaring
text: The good times kept rolling heading into the weekend.

title: Autodesk to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: SAN FRANCISCO , May 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) today announced its executives will be speaking at the following investor conferences: June 6, 2022                Baird 2022 Global Consumer, Technology & Services Conference June 7, 2022                Stifel 2022 Cross Sector Insight Conference A live webcast and replay of the presentations will be available through Autodesk's Investor Relations Website at investors.autodesk.com. Please go to the Website 15 minutes early to register, download and install any necessary software.

title: Autodesk, Inc. (ADSK) CEO Andrew Anagnost on Q1 2023 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call May 26, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Simon Mays-Smith - Vice President, Investor Relations Andrew Anagnost - Chief Executive Officer Debbie Clifford - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Phil Winslow - Credit Suisse Jay Vleeschhouwer - Griffin Securities Saket Kalia - Barclays Adam Borg - Stifel Matt Hedberg - RBC Capital Markets Joe Vruwink - Baird Keith Weiss - Morgan Stanley Steve Koenig - SMBC Nikko Bhavin Shah - Deutsche Bank Operator Thank you for standing by and welcome to Autodesk First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Call. [Operator Instructions] I would now like to hand the call over to your host, VP, Investor Relations, Simon Mays-Smith.

title: Autodesk (ADSK) Beats Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Autodesk (ADSK) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 7.52% and 1.62%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: AUTODESK, INC. ANNOUNCES FISCAL 2023 FIRST QUARTER RESULTS
text: - First quarter, year-over-year revenue growth of 18 percent and billings growth of 16 percent - First quarter GAAP and non-GAAP operating margin expanded by 4 and 6 percentage points, respectively SAN FRANCISCO , May 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) today reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2023. All growth rates are compared to the first quarter of fiscal 2022, unless otherwise noted.

title: There Is Growth Ahead For Autodesk
text: Autodesk operates in an expanding total addressable market. High Switching Costs and Network effects are advantages to Autodesk's business.

title: Autodesk (ADSK) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Autodesk's (ADSK) Q1 performance is expected to reflect the benefits of the strong demand for its software products, higher subscription revenues, steady renewals and new customer billings.

title: 2 Nasdaq Stocks Wall Street's Talking About
text: As the stock market rises, these companies are getting some attention from investors.

title: Autodesk Stock Is Downgraded. This Analyst Expects Sales and Billings Estimates to Be Lowered.
text: Deutsche Bank analyst Bhavin Shah downgrades the stock to Hold from Buy, saying he believes management will guide for lower revenue, billings, and earnings in the following quarters.

title: Autodesk Stock Hits 2-Year Low After Downgrade
text: Autodesk Inc (NASDAQ:ADSK) is down 8.7% to trade at $174.46 at last glance, after Deutsche Bank downgraded the stock to "hold" from "buy" ahead of Friday's upcoming earnings report.

title: Autodesk stock drops after Deutsche Bank downgrades ahead of earnings report
text: Shares of Autodesk Inc. ADSK, -1.19% dropped 3.0% in premarket trading Monday, after they were downgraded at Deutsche Bank ahead of the design software company's first-quarter earnings report due out later this week. Analyst Bhavin Shah cut his rating to hold from buy and slashed his stock price target to $225 from $275, following conversations with "platinum partners" that indicated the earnings report would be "mixed.

title: 12 Growth Blue-Chip Bargains I'm Buying Hand Over Fist
text: The 2nd-worst start to the year in market history has generated the worst investor sentiment in 30 years. Hedge Funds have been selling stocks in the tens of billions of dollars, while Warren Buffett bought $41 billion of net stock in Q1.

title: Autodesk: Attractive, But Waiting For A Better Entry Price
text: Autodesk is a leading company for 3D design, engineering, and entertainment software. Structural tailwinds for ADSK such as accelerating digitalization, ESG, and virtual reality likely support a multi-year growth outlook of 15-20% CAGR.

title: Autodesk Extends Invitation to Join Financial Results Conference Call
text: First Quarter Fiscal 2023 Financial Results Conference Call to be Held Thursday, May 26, 2022, 2:00 p.m. PT SAN FRANCISCO , May 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Autodesk, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADSK) today announced it will broadcast its first quarter fiscal 2023 financial results conference call via its website Thursday, May 26, 2022, at 2:00 p.m.
